title: Drive and manoeuvre trailers
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Drive and manoeuvre trailers demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Carry out trailer safety inspection

pcs.text: Pre-operational inspections and checks of trailer are carried out according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures1.2 Trailer load is inspected and secured according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures1.3 Safe condition of towing vehicle is determined according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Pre-operational inspections and checks of trailer are carried out according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures1.2 Trailer load is inspected and secured according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures1.3 Safe condition of towing vehicle is determined according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Pre-operational inspections and checks of trailer are carried out according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures1.2 Trailer load is inspected and secured according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures1.3 Safe condition of towing vehicle is determined according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Carry out trailer safety inspection

elements.title: Connect trailer to vehicle

pcs.text: Trailer and vehicle are aligned and trailer is coupled to vehicle according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and safety requirements2.2 Ancillary devices are connected between vehicle and trailer according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures2.3 Trailer and vehicle connections are tested according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures2.4 Faults are identified and action is taken to report them according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Trailer and vehicle are aligned and trailer is coupled to vehicle according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and safety requirements2.2 Ancillary devices are connected between vehicle and trailer according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures2.3 Trailer and vehicle connections are tested according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures2.4 Faults are identified and action is taken to report them according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Trailer and vehicle are aligned and trailer is coupled to vehicle according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and safety requirements2.2 Ancillary devices are connected between vehicle and trailer according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures2.3 Trailer and vehicle connections are tested according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures2.4 Faults are identified and action is taken to report them according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Connect trailer to vehicle

elements.title: Drive and manoeuvre trailer

pcs.text: Brake lock-out devices are set according to manufacturer procedures3.2 Trailer is safely manoeuvred by vehicle in forward and reverse directions and parked according to road safety regulations, and without causing damage to trailer, towing vehicle, other vehicles or surrounding environment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Brake lock-out devices are set according to manufacturer procedures3.2 Trailer is safely manoeuvred by vehicle in forward and reverse directions and parked according to road safety regulations, and without causing damage to trailer, towing vehicle, other vehicles or surrounding environment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Brake lock-out devices are set according to manufacturer procedures3.2 Trailer is safely manoeuvred by vehicle in forward and reverse directions and parked according to road safety regulations, and without causing damage to trailer, towing vehicle, other vehicles or surrounding environment.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Drive and manoeuvre trailer

elements.title: Disconnect trailer from vehicle

pcs.text: Parking devices of trailer and vehicle are applied as appropriate according to manufacturer procedures4.2 Ancillary devices are disconnected and trailer is decoupled from vehicle according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and safety requirements4.3 Trailer or vehicle is placed in appropriate parking area according to road safety regulations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Parking devices of trailer and vehicle are applied as appropriate according to manufacturer procedures4.2 Ancillary devices are disconnected and trailer is decoupled from vehicle according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and safety requirements4.3 Trailer or vehicle is placed in appropriate parking area according to road safety regulations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Parking devices of trailer and vehicle are applied as appropriate according to manufacturer procedures4.2 Ancillary devices are disconnected and trailer is decoupled from vehicle according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and safety requirements4.3 Trailer or vehicle is placed in appropriate parking area according to road safety regulations.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Disconnect trailer from vehicle

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
